title: MediaMon - Cobblemon Addon
description: A fakemon addon that adds pokemon based on popular media!
body:
This Addon is based around popular characters in media, designs can be taken from the source material, or be entirely brand new!


It currently adds:


Pochita - From Chainsaw Man - spawns in the nether

Bocchi - From Bocchi the Rock - spawns in swamps

Nijika- From Bocchi the Rock - spawns in floral 

Ryo- From Bocchi the Rock - spawns in plateaus

Kita- From Bocchi the Rock - spawns in overworld


Cobblemon 1.4 Required !!
